arts.ttl: Frenkie de Jong gets clear warning from Barcelona: ‘Either extend contract or go’
arts.sum: Among a number of players, Frenkie de Jong has been handed an ultimatum as Barcelona look to get bodies out the door (SPORT/VP).

arts.ttl: Spanish government deny reports of temporary Barcelona registration for Dani Olmo
arts.sum: The Spanish government deny reports of a temporary registration for Barcelona midfielder Dani Olmo.

arts.ttl: Both Real Madrid & Barcelona face La Liga opposition in Copa del Rey last 16 draw
arts.sum: The draw for the last 16 of the Copa del Rey was made early this afternoon by the RFEF, with the remaining clubs in Spain’s top cup competition discovering their…

arts.ttl: Copa del Rey last-16 draw: Who will Real Madrid, Barcelona face in the Spanish Cup?
arts.sum: Real Madrid will face Celta Vigo in the last-16 stage of the 2024-25 Copa del Rey, while Barcelona are drawn against Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Dani Olmo decision puts LaLiga ‘WAR FOOTING’ as Real Madrid stance revealed
arts.sum: Dani Olmo decision puts LaLiga ‘WAR FOOTING’ as Real Madrid stance revealed Olmo and Pau Victor have been blocked from being registered by the Catalan club for the second half of the season due to their failure to meet with Financial Fair Play (FFP) requirements by the end of December.

arts.ttl: Clásico rivals brace for extra chaos in January frenzy: Real Madrid and Barcelona find out Copa fate
arts.sum: The draw for the Copa del Rey round of 16 takes place on Wednesday (January 8), with Real Madrid and Barcelona set to learn their opponents as they continue their push to win multiple trophies in 2024/25. Additionally, Madrid will take part in the new-and-improved FIFA Club World Cup in the summer of 2025, which means they could end the season with seven trophies.

arts.ttl: Barca defend Laporta over Olmo saga, confirm club can sign ‘perfectly’ in January
arts.sum: There was also praise for Laporta’s deal to sell off VIP boxes to bring in the income required to register the two players as Fort denied claims of mortgaging the club. Laporta has come in for criticism for his role in the mess which means that currently both players are not registered with the club and can’t play.

arts.ttl: Barcelona 'CAN register Dani Olmo but only for the time being' after club lodged appeal in ongoing saga, with £50m Premier League target unable to play due to financial issues
arts.sum: According to reports in Spain, the club are set to be granted a precautionary measure which will allow them to temporarily register Olmo.

arts.ttl: Barcelona legend Patrick Kluivert appointed Indonesia manager
arts.sum: Patrick Kluivert has been appointed as the new manager of Indonesia. Since his retirement from football in 2009, Kluivert has taken up various coaching roles and was also academy director at...

arts.ttl: How to watch Athletic Bilbao vs Barcelona: TV channel and live stream for Spanish Super Cup semi-final today
arts.sum: Catalan giants looking to restore confidence after recent blip
